---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A short, clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem It Solves

What limitation or inconvenience does this address? Who would benefit?

## Proposed Solution

How do you imagine it working? Feel free to describe it in plain language or with examples.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other approaches that could solve the same problem?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, links, or other context that might help. If this is related to a specific ChatGPT feature (e.g. shared links, memory, canvas), mention it here.
